title: dimorphotheca tragus
intro: Dimorphotheca tragus, also known as the Cape marigold, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dimorphotheca tragus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
